system.description:
Based on a Black Templars design, these bolts release a small core of neuro-inhibitors laced with warp-reductive compounds that disrupt a creature’s connection to the warp.

Effects: In addition to taking normal Damage from the weapon, any creature with a Psy Rating who takes Damage from a witch bolt reduces its Psy Rating by 1 for 1d10 Rounds each time. During this time, the creature may not Push its Psychic Strength. Additionally, creatures with Warp Instability must immediately make a Willpower Test to check for disruption as described in the Trait.

Used With: All bolt weapons.
